zh.lifeSummary: 當Amicia Ferrers於大約1063年出生在法國諾門迪艾時，她的父親Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday28歲，母親Bertha20歲。她和Nigel d'Aubigny至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1135年1月1日在英國德比夏爾德比享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amicia Ferrers于大约1063年出生在法国諾門迪艾时，她的父亲Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday28岁，母亲Bertha20岁。她和Nigel d'Aubigny至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1135年1月1日在英国德比夏爾德比享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Amicia Ferrers was born about 1063, in Eure, Normandy, France, her father, Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday, was 28 and her mother, Bertha, was 20. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Nigel d'Aubigny. She died on 1 January 1135, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amicia Ferrers est née environ 1063, à Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Bertha, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Nigel d'Aubigny. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1135, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.Wales, England, United Kingdom: Wales, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Amicia Ferrers um 1063 in Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday 28 und ihre Mutter Bertha 20. Sie hatte mit Nigel d'Aubigny mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1135 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Derby, Derbyshire, England.

Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Nigel d'Aubigny. Morì il 1 gennaio 1135, nel Derby, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amicia Ferrersが約1063年にフランスノーマンディエウアで生まれた時，父Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesdayは28歳，母Berthaは20歳であった。彼女はNigel d'Aubignyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1135年1月1日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amicia Ferrers(이)가 대략 1063년 프랑스 노먼디 우르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Nigel d'Aubigny(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1135년 1월 1일 영국 더비실르 더비에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amicia Ferrers родилась около 1063 г. в местности эур, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Nigel d'Aubigny. Она умерла 1 января 1135 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.
